form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of nine weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Ctry Bm66 February 2 over 1150m, soft track; 3 len behind New Pharoah with 58.5kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign third of 13 at Sale Mdn-Sw July 31 over 1110m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Semelle Rouge with 57.5kg at $10. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming after 19 months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation second of 10 at Wyong Mid Bm64 September 1 2024 over 1350m, 1.0 len behind Etched In Time carrying 55.5kg at $13. When resuming last campaign fifth of 13 at Muswellbrook Bm66 May 3 2024 over 1000m, soft track; 4 len behind Yirrkala with 58kg at $14. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Mare back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at this track Cl2 Bm62 December 1 over 1005m, 5.5 len behind Brown Sugar carrying 55.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign third of 8 at Gosford Mid Mdn May 29 over 1000m, on heavy track; 4 len behind Donwon carrying 55kg at $11. Anticipating her to hit the ground running this campaign.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second run back. Comes off a 39-day let-up. First-up after four months raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 10 at Coffs Harbour Bm58 on March 1 over 1212m, slow going 7 len behind Little Prophet with 56kg at $41. Previously second-up won by 2 len at Casterton Mdn-Sw August 31 over 1400m on a soft track defeating Bobbin Back with 57.5kg at $7. Can't see her turning things around.
